scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:ui && npm prune --omit=dev && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD) --build-arg COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -t web-archive:local --load . && npm install
scripts.docker:deploy: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && docker tag web-archive:local docker.artifacts.tdkottke.com/web-archive:latest && docker tag web-archive:local docker.artifacts.tdkottke.com/web-archive:$VERSION && docker push docker.artifacts.tdkottke.com/web-archive:latest && docker push docker.artifacts.tdkottke.com/web-archive:$VERSION
